title: AntiSpeedHackPlugin
body:
# AntiSpeedHackPlugin ## Overview of this Plugin This plugin has the ability to detect and roll back speed hacks.
*This plugin has been translated from Japanese to English. Some parts may contain unnatural expressions. ## what is added When a speed hack is detected, it will roll back the distance traveled by the detected player's speed hack.
No special commands are added. ## Test environment Paper 1.21.4 211 ## How to install 1.Download the Plugin file (.jar)
Which version should I download? If you are using a Spigot server → Spigot version
If you are using a Paper server → Paper version or Spigot version
If you are using a Purpur server → Paper version or Spigot version
If you are using a Folia server → Paper version
If you are using an Arclight server → Spigot version
In environments where Paper version is available, we recommend the Paper version.
2.Copy or move the downloaded plugin file into the Paper/Folia/Purpur "plugins" folder
3.(Re)start the Paper/Folia/Purpur server
4.Done! ## others Development environment: IntelliJ IDEA
